title: ModeRecord
description: A single computed eigenmode from a spectral solve.

operatorType.description: Which operator type produced this mode (GaussNewton or FullHessian)

residualNorm.description: Residual norm ||H v - lambda M v|| / ||v||_M

multiplicityClusterId.description: Multiplicity cluster ID (assigned by spectral clustering)

gaugeLeakScore.description: Gauge leak score: fraction of mode energy in gauge subspace

nullModeDiagnosis.description: Null mode diagnosis (set for modes with |eigenvalue| near zero)

modeIndex.description: Index within the spectrum (0-based, sorted by eigenvalue ascending)

tensorEnergyFractions.description: Energy fraction per tensor signature label. Values are non-negative and sum to 1.0.

blockEnergyFractions.description: Energy fraction per state-space block. Values are non-negative and sum to 1.0.

modeVectorArtifactRef.description: Artifact path reference for the stored mode vector on disk

observedSignatureRef.description: Reference to the computed observed mode signature (set by M29 Observables pipeline)
